# neon-noise-2

Ambient noise generator built on create-neon-app base styling.

## Run

```bash
python3 -m http.server 8000
```

## Structure

```
index.html      - App shell matching create-neon-app patterns
style.css       - Base styles + noise-specific sections
app.js          - Main app, imports neon-ui/neon-fx
noise-engine.js - Web Audio noise generation
cloud.js        - Preset save/load via neon-cloud
```

## External Libraries

```javascript
import { createKnob, createLedButton, createSpectrumAnalyzer, showToast } from '../../packages/neon-ui/index.js';
import { AdaptiveNoise } from '../../packages/neon-fx/index.js';
import { CloudStore, timeAgo } from '../../packages/neon-cloud/index.js';
```

## Layout

- max-width: 700px (narrower than neon-drums)
- Header: logo + master knob + save/load/power buttons
- Channels section: 4 noise type knobs (cyan themed)
- Adaptive section: LED toggle + sensitivity knob (magenta themed)
- Visualizers: output spectrum + mic input (when adaptive)
- Footer: status text centered
- Sidebar: presets feed (slide-in from right)

## Noise Types

| Type | Color | Frequency |
|------|-------|-----------|
| Brown | orange | Low (rumble) |
| Pink | magenta | Mid-low |
| Green | green | Mid (bandpass) |
| White | cyan | Full spectrum |

## Key Components

### Power Button
```javascript
powerBtn.classList.add('playing');  // Green glow
powerBtn.classList.remove('playing');
```

### Adaptive Mode
```css
.adaptive-section.active  /* Magenta glow + pulse animation */
```

### Channel Knobs
Large knobs with per-type colors.

### Preset Feed
Color bars show volume levels for each noise type.

## NoiseEngine API

```javascript
engine.start()                      // Start AudioContext
engine.stop()                       // Suspend
engine.setMasterVolume(0-1)
engine.setChannelVolume(type, 0-1)  // white|pink|brown|green
engine.serialize()                  // { volumes, sensitivity, name }
engine.deserialize(data)
```

## AdaptiveNoise Plugin

```javascript
const adaptive = new AdaptiveNoise(ctx, {
    sensitivity: 50,
    onUpdate: (controlValues) => {
        // controlValues = { white, pink, brown, green } boost amounts
    }
});
micSource.connect(adaptive.sidechainInput);
adaptive.start();
adaptive.stop();
```

## Design Conventions

Follows create-neon-app patterns:
- CSS variables for colors (--nc, --nm, --nl, --no, --np)
- .btn-machine.btn-square.btn-transport for header buttons
- .section-tag for section labels
- .playing class for active states
- neon-ui components for knobs, LEDs, analyzers
